title: Semi-Realistic Moon (Vanilla Phases)
description: Makes Minecraft's moon look more like the real Moon, while keeping the bad astronomy.
body:
Changes the Moon texture to look like a square version of the Moon in real life, while keeping a low-ish resolution to fit with vanilla.

This version matches the vanilla moon texture, but it is not physically correct. Minecraft's moon is rotatetd 90° from reality, and the phases are either reversed or go based on when it's setting.

The (better) version with the proper phases and moon rotation is [available here.](https://modrinth.com/project/semi-realistic-moon) It looks very good with shaders that have a sun/moon angle.

![.gif of the phases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cb13034fa4f9e999a20e646be8b333e7740bd6d.gif)

Should be compatible with all versions going forward and back, unless Mojang messes with the folder structure.
